                       "explanation":  "Add ticket status enum and domain validation methods for unique seats in hall and no duplicate ticket per seat/screening.",
                       "input":  "*** Begin Patch\n*** Add File: c:\\Users\\evilp\\source\\repos\\csharp-lab\\Vjezba.Model\\Vjezba.Model\\Models\\Entities\\TicketStatus.cs\n+namespace Vjezba.Model.Models.Entities;\n+\n+public enum TicketStatus\n+{\n+    Active,\n+    Cancelled,\n+    Used\n+}\n*** Update File: c:\\Users\\evilp\\source\\repos\\csharp-lab\\Vjezba.Model\\Vjezba.Model\\Models\\Entities\\Hall.cs\n@@\n public class Hall\n {\n     public int Id { get; set; }\n     public string Name { get; set; } = string.Empty;\n     public int Capacity { get; set; }\n     public bool Supports3D { get; set; }\n     public List\u003cSeat\u003e Seats { get; set; } = new List\u003cSeat\u003e();\n     public List\u003cScreening\u003e Screenings { get; set; } = new List\u003cScreening\u003e();\n+\n+    public void AddSeat(Seat seat)\n+    {\n+        if (seat == null)\n+        {\n+            throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(seat));\n+        }\n+\n+        bool alreadyExists = Seats.Any(s =\u003e\n+            string.Equals(s.RowLabel, seat.RowLabel, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) \u0026\u0026\n+            s.SeatNumber == seat.SeatNumber);\n+\n+        if (alreadyExists)\n+        {\n+            throw new InvalidOperationException(\"A seat with the same row and number already exists in this hall.\");\n+        }\n+\n+        Seats.Add(seat);\n+    }\n }\n*** Update File: c:\\Users\\evilp\\source\\repos\\csharp-lab\\Vjezba.Model\\Vjezba.Model\\Models\\Entities\\Ticket.cs\n@@\n public class Ticket\n {\n     public int Id { get; set; }\n     public string TicketNumber { get; set; } = string.Empty;\n     public DateTime PurchasedAt { get; set; }\n     public decimal Price { get; set; }\n+    public TicketStatus Status { get; set; } = TicketStatus.Active;\n     public Screening? Screening { get; set; }\n     public Seat? Seat { get; set; }\n     public Customer? Customer { get; set; }\n+\n+    public static void EnsureSeatAvailability(List\u003cTicket\u003e existingTickets, Screening screening, Seat seat)\n+    {\n+        if (existingTickets == null)\n+        {\n+            throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(existingTickets));\n+        }\n+\n+        if (screening == null)\n+        {\n+            throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(screening));\n+        }\n+\n+        if (seat == null)\n+        {\n+            throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(seat));\n+        }\n+\n+        bool duplicateExists = existingTickets.Any(t =\u003e\n+            t.Screening != null \u0026\u0026\n+            t.Seat != null \u0026\u0026\n+            t.Screening.Id == screening.Id \u0026\u0026\n+            t.Seat.Id == seat.Id \u0026\u0026\n+            t.Status != TicketStatus.Cancelled);\n+\n+        if (duplicateExists)\n+        {\n+            throw new InvalidOperationException(\"A ticket for this seat and screening already exists.\");\n+        }\n+    }\n }\n*** End Patch"
                   }

    "tool_name":  "apply_patch",
    "tool_input":  {
                       "explanation":  "Expand initialOutput with detailed entity output and simple LINQ queries over object model.",
                       "input":  "*** Begin Patch\n*** Update File: c:\\Users\\evilp\\source\\repos\\csharp-lab\\Vjezba.Model\\Vjezba.Model\\Main.cs\n@@\n     public static void initialOutput()\n     {\n         Console.WriteLine(\"=== Pocetni podaci kino sustava ===\");\n         Console.WriteLine($\"Broj kina: {Cinemas.Count}\");\n         Console.WriteLine($\"Broj kupaca: {Customers.Count}\");\n         Console.WriteLine($\"Broj ulaznica: {Tickets.Count}\");\n \n+        Console.WriteLine();\n+        Console.WriteLine(\"=== Detaljni ispis kina, dvorana i projekcija ===\");\n         foreach (var cinema in Cinemas)\n         {\n-            Console.WriteLine($\"- {cinema.Name} ({cinema.City}) | dvorana: {cinema.Halls.Count}\");\n+            Console.WriteLine($\"Kino: {cinema.Name} ({cinema.City})\");\n+            Console.WriteLine($\"Adresa: {cinema.Address}, {cinema.PostalCode}\");\n+            Console.WriteLine($\"Dvorana: {cinema.Halls.Count}\");\n+\n+            foreach (var hall in cinema.Halls)\n+            {\n+                Console.WriteLine($\"  - {hall.Name} | Kapacitet: {hall.Capacity} | 3D: {(hall.Supports3D ? \"DA\" : \"NE\")}\");\n+\n+                foreach (var screening in hall.Screenings)\n+                {\n+                    var movieTitle = screening.Movie?.Title ?? \"Nepoznat film\";\n+                    Console.WriteLine($\"      Projekcija: {movieTitle} | {screening.StartTime:dd.MM.yyyy HH:mm} | 3D: {(screening.Is3D ? \"DA\" : \"NE\")}\");\n+                }\n+            }\n+\n+            Console.WriteLine();\n         }\n+\n+        Console.WriteLine(\"=== Detaljni ispis kupaca i ulaznica ===\");\n+        foreach (var customer in Customers)\n+        {\n+            Console.WriteLine($\"Kupac: {customer.FirstName} {customer.LastName} | Loyalty: {(customer.IsLoyaltyMember ? \"DA\" : \"NE\")} | Bodovi: {customer.LoyaltyPoints}\");\n+        }\n+\n+        Console.WriteLine();\n+        foreach (var ticket in Tickets)\n+        {\n+            var movieTitle = ticket.Screening?.Movie?.Title ?? \"Nepoznat film\";\n+            var customerName = ticket.Customer is null\n+                ? \"Nepoznat kupac\"\n+                : $\"{ticket.Customer.FirstName} {ticket.Customer.LastName}\";\n+            Console.WriteLine($\"Ulaznica {ticket.TicketNumber} | Film: {movieTitle} | Kupac: {customerName} | Cijena: {ticket.Price} EUR | Status: {ticket.Status}\");\n+        }\n+\n+        Console.WriteLine();\n+        Console.WriteLine(\"=== Jednostavni LINQ upiti ===\");\n+\n+        var kinaSa3DDvoranom = Cinemas\n+            .Where(c =\u003e c.Halls.Any(h =\u003e h.Supports3D))\n+            .Select(c =\u003e c.Name);\n+\n+        var aktivneUlaznice = Tickets\n+            .Where(t =\u003e t.Status == TicketStatus.Active)\n+            .Select(t =\u003e t.TicketNumber);\n+\n+        var projekcijeNakon19 = Cinemas\n+            .SelectMany(c =\u003e c.Halls)\n+            .SelectMany(h =\u003e h.Screenings)\n+            .Where(s =\u003e s.StartTime.Hour \u003e= 19)\n+            .Select(s =\u003e $\"{s.Movie?.Title} ({s.StartTime:dd.MM HH:mm})\");\n+\n+        var topLoyaltyKupac = Customers\n+            .OrderByDescending(c =\u003e c.LoyaltyPoints)\n+            .FirstOrDefault();\n+\n+        Console.WriteLine(\"Kina koja imaju barem jednu 3D dvoranu:\");\n+        foreach (var nazivKina in kinaSa3DDvoranom)\n+        {\n+            Console.WriteLine($\"- {nazivKina}\");\n+        }\n+\n+        Console.WriteLine(\"Aktivne ulaznice:\");\n+        foreach (var ticketNumber in aktivneUlaznice)\n+        {\n+            Console.WriteLine($\"- {ticketNumber}\");\n+        }\n+\n+        Console.WriteLine(\"Projekcije koje pocinju nakon 19:00:\");\n+        foreach (var projekcija in projekcijeNakon19)\n+        {\n+            Console.WriteLine($\"- {projekcija}\");\n+        }\n+\n+        if (topLoyaltyKupac is not null)\n+        {\n+            Console.WriteLine($\"Kupac s najvise bodova: {topLoyaltyKupac.FirstName} {topLoyaltyKupac.LastName} ({topLoyaltyKupac.LoyaltyPoints})\");\n+        }\n     }\n }\n*** End Patch"
                   }
